name: Infant Bacterial Therapeutics AB (publ)
summary: Infant Bacterial Therapeutics AB (publ), a clinical stage pharmaceutical company, develops drugs to prevent or treat rare diseases affecting infants. The company's lead drug candidate is IBP-9414, to prevent necrotizing enterocolitis, as well as to improve feeding tolerance affecting premature infants. It is also developing IBP-1016 for the treatment of an unmet medical need in gastroschisis, a severe disease in infants. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
